chapter_title.en: Chapter on Forgetfulness in sa'i Between Safa and Marwah

text: 2848 - رَوَى اَلْعَلاَءُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَحَدِهِمَا عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ نَسِيَ أَنْ يَطُوفُ بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ قَالَ «يُطَافُ عَنْهُ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2848 - Al-‘Ala’ narrated from Muhammad ibn Muslim, from one of the Imams (as):
"I asked him about a man who forgot to perform the Sa’i (the walking) between Safa and Marwah. Imam (as) said: 'It can be performed on his behalf.'"
